Nour Gehad Elmaghalawy
Cairo, Egypt, nourimaghalawy@gmail.com, 01021225178
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/nourmaghalawy, Medium: medium.com/@nourimaghalawy, GitHub: github.com/nourSOC,
Portfolio: noursoc.github.io
LetsDefend: app.letsdefend.io/user/nourelmaghalawy, Military Service: Completed

────────────────────────
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
────────────────────────
SOC Analyst Trainee with hands-on experience in SIEM monitoring, alert triage, and incident response using Splunk,
ELK Stack, and FortiSIEM. Experienced in phishing analysis, malware triage, IDS/IPS monitoring with Snort, and
security automation using SOAR and n8n. Motivated to grow within a SOC or cybersecurity operations team.

────────────────────
TECHNICAL SKILLS
────────────────────
SOC & Incident Response: Alert triage, incident handling, SOC playbooks
SIEM & Detection Engineering: Splunk, IBM QRadar, FortiSIEM, ELK Stack, detection rules (Windows Event IDs)
SOAR & Automation: SOAR workflows design and execution, Security automation using n8n, Alert enrichment and
response automation
Threat Analysis: Phishing analysis, malware triage, info-stealer behavior analysis
Network Security: TCP/IP, Wireshark, Snort IDS/IPS rule creation and tuning, firewalls, WAF
Endpoint & OS Security: Windows Security Events, Linux (Kali, Ubuntu), EDR/AV concepts
Web Security: OWASP Top 10, Web attack detection, vulnerability assessment (basic)
Malware & Forensics Basics: malware triage, sandboxing concepts, evidence collection
Automation & Scripting: Python (security automation), Bash (log parsing), GitHub

──────────────
EXPERIENCE
──────────────
SOC Analyst Trainee
WE Innovate Cybersecurity Academy (Round 1 - 2025) Powered by ZeroSploit MEA and Information
Technology Institute (ITI), Nov 2025 to Jan 2026
Investigated security alerts using SIEM platforms (Splunk, ELK).
Performed alert triage and threat analysis aligned with MITRE ATT&CK.
Analyzed Windows Security Events and network logs for anomaly detection.
Created detection rules and investigated suspicious PowerShell activity.
Networking, Cybersecurity Fundamentals Trainee
BARQ Systems, Round 12, Cairo, Egypt, Oct 2025 to Nov 2025
Completed intensive training covering networking and security fundamentals.
Gained hands-on experience with Juniper Routers & Switches (interface setup, routing policies, OSPF, and traffic
filtering).
Practiced FortiGate Firewall configurations, including NAT, firewall policies, IPsec VPNs, and High Availability (HA).
Strengthened troubleshooting, teamwork, and technical skills through practical lab exercises.
Cybersecurity Intern
BEDO Company, Damietta, Egypt, July 2022
Conducted hands-on labs using Linux and Kali Linux, focusing on vulnerability discovery and enumeration
techniques.
Analyzed attack vectors for network and web applications, documenting findings along with suggested mitigations.
Assisted with SOC tasks, including log reviews, alert triage, and incident documentation.
Graduation Project, Facial Recognition System, November 2022 to July 2023
Developed a prototype facial recognition system aimed at enhancing security monitoring.
Managed dataset collection, model evaluation, and testing processes.
Documented the project architecture and created a demo for the evaluation.

────────────
PROJECTS
────────────
Info-Stealer Detection Lab
Built a blue-team lab to detect fileless malware behavior using Windows logs and SIEM analysis.
Snort IDS/IPS Lab
Implemented Snort in IDS and Inline IPS mode to detect and block malicious traffic using custom rules.
Active Directory Security Hardening
Configured domain security policies and monitoring using Windows Security Events.
Deception-Based Early Breach Detection Research
This project explores a lightweight deception-based detection model designed to identify attackers during
the earliest stages of intrusion. Instead of relying on traditional, alert-heavy monitoring

─────────────
EDUCATION
─────────────
B.Sc. in Information Technology, Damietta University (Sep 2019 to Jul 2023)
Courses & certificates
We innovate SOC Analysis (2026)
Barq Systems Networking and cybersecurity fundamentals (2025)
SOC Analyst Path Certification (LetsDefend, 2024)
eCIR, Netriders Academy (2025)
Digital Forensics Essentials, EC-Council (2024)
Wireless Networks Penetration Testing (2024)
Malware Analysis Skill Path Certification, LetsDefend (2024)
Fortinet Certified Fundamentals in Cybersecurity, Fortinet (2024)
NDG Linux Unhatched, Cisco Networking Academy (2024)
FortiSIEM 5.2 Self-Paced Training, Fortinet (2024)
Splunk Beginner Learning Path, Splunk (2024)
CCNA, Cisco (2023, self-study)
MCSA, Microsoft (2023, self-study)
Cisco CyberOps Associate, Cisco (2024, self-study)
(Certificates and proofs available upon request)

────────────────
ACHIEVEMENTS
────────────────
Ranked 17th on LetsDefend local leaderboard (practical skills demonstrated)
Graduation project graded Excellent (A)

─────────────
LANGUAGES
─────────────
Arabic, Native
English, Intermediate (continuously improving)

────────────────
NOURAN KAMHA
────────────────
New Cairo, Cairo, Egypt
Phone: +20 1063401133 Email: nourankamha@gmail.com LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/nourankamha

─────────────
OBJECTIVE
─────────────
Motivated and detail-oriented Computer Science and Engineering student at the German University in Cairo,
seeking internship opportunities in software development or full stack engineering. Passionate about building
scalable applications and solving real-world problems using a blend of front-end and back-end technologies. Eager
to contribute to a dynamic tech team while gaining hands-on industry experience.

──────────────
EXPERIENCE
──────────────
Web Developer (Part-Time) – N’s Websites | Jan 2025 – Present
WordPress Website Developer | Remote / Cairo, Egypt
• Designed, built, and maintained responsive websites using WordPress, leveraging themes such as Astra and plugins like
Spectra.
• Customized layouts and UI components using page builders; integrated interactive features such as video sliders and
dynamic sidebars.
• Optimized website performance for page speed, SEO, and WCAG accessibility standards.
• Collaborated within an Agile team using sprints to deliver features, resolve issues, and iterate on client feedback.
Klickit | July 2025 – Sep 2025
Software Engineering Intern – Technology Department | Cairo, Egypt
• Built a real client-facing web platform using .NET (Clean Architecture) and Angular, contributing to a project that
will be deployed in production.
• Applied the CQRS design pattern to improve system structure, maintainability, and scalability.
• Developed and executed effective unit tests to ensure code quality and reliability.
• Implemented secure authentication flows using JWT tokens.
• Collaborated on GitLab, contributing to both frontend and backend tasks while maintaining clear communication to
ensure smooth integration.
• Built a real estate payment platform for developers and prepared a demo for client presentation; additionally extended
KlickIt’s education payment system with an e-commerce module for purchasing school uniforms and books.
Elsewedy Electric | July 2024 – Sep 2024
Full Stack Developer Intern – Application Development and BI Department
• Developed an Inventory Management System using ASP.NET Core MVC & Entity Framework for the backend
and HTML, JavaScript, CSS, jQuery for the frontend.
• Monitored stock levels across various warehouses, notifying personnel when stock was low.
• Managed inventory by enabling the addition, removal, and transfer of products between stores.
• Generated reports on stock levels, product movements, and trends to support data-driven decision-making.

─────────────
EDUCATION
─────────────
German University in Cairo | Oct. 2021 – Oct 2026
Faculty of Media Engineering and Technology | Cairo, Egypt
Major: Computer Science and Engineering Program

────────────
PROJECTS
────────────
Bachelor Project – VR Intelligent Assistant with Arabic-English Code-Switching
Grade: Excellent | Mar 2025 – Jun 2025

• Bachelor thesis project focused on building a virtual reality-based intelligent assistant capable of understanding and
responding to code-switched Arabic-English conversations, particularly Egyptian Arabic.
• Designing and integrating key components including speech-to-text (STT), natural language understanding and
generation, text-to-speech (TTS), and virtual environment interaction.
• Exploring publicly available datasets and constructing custom datasets to support dialectal and context-aware training
and evaluation.
• Targeting use cases in education and tutoring by enabling realistic, responsive, and dialect-aware spoken interaction
within immersive VR settings.

Implementing and designing a game | Java (Eclipse IDE), HTML, CSS, Javascript | May 2023
• The Last of Us: Legacy is a single player survival game set in a zombie apocalyptic world.
• Implemented object-oriented programming practices such as inheritance to create different characters.
Advising System for advising students | SQL Visual Studio Code, HTML, CSS, Javascript | Dec 2023
• Created an advising system where different types of users can use the system. Users are either: Admin, Advisor or
Student.
• The system keeps track of the courses missed, courses selected by students, selected courses’ grade and semester,
students’ GPA, graduation plans.
Non-Monetary Donation Web Application | HTML, CSS, Javascript, Github
• Non-monetary donation application for an NGO (non-government organization) that will help both the donors and
anyone who is requesting a donation to reach each other.
• The project was divided to two milestones where the first milestone was focusing on collecting requirements engineering,
and the second milestone was about front-end design and development.
• The following points where covered in this project; Learnability, Visibility, Efficiency, Design for errors, Navigation from
page to page and navigation reversibility, Responsiveness of the UI, Consistency of the IU elements.
TravelM8 | MERN Stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js) | Nov 2024
• Developed ”TravelM8,” a comprehensive travel planning web application that streamlines vacation planning by
integrating personalized suggestions, real-time notifications, and seamless booking capabilities.
• Implemented key features such as budget-based activity recommendations, curated local attractions, and customizable
itineraries.
• Utilized Agile methodology to deliver the project in 3 sprints, meeting functional and non-functional requirements.
• Contributed to a responsive front-end and scalable back-end, ensuring smooth interaction between all components.
• Collaborated on GitHub, showcasing individual contributions and team effort.
• Link: https://github.com/Advanced-computer-lab-2024/TravelM8

Relevant Coursework
• Data Structures | • Embedded Systems | • Computer Architecture • Databases
• Computer Organization • Digital System Design • Operating System | • Computer Graphics
• OOP | • Theory of Computation • Software Engineering • Management

────────────────────
TECHNICAL SKILLS
────────────────────
Languages & Frameworks: C#, ASP.NET MVC, .NET 8, Entity Framework Core, Angular, React, Java, Python, C,
HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL, VHDL, Verilog
Developer Tools & Technologies: Visual Studio, Visual Studio Code, SQL Server Management Studio, GitLab, GitHub,
Eclipse, JCreator, Postman, PgAdmin, Cisco Packet Tracer, Quartus, Unit Testing, JWT Authentication, Clean
Architecture, CQRS Pattern
Extracurricular
IEEE Club - German University in Cairo | Oct 2023 – Oct 2024
Head | Cairo, Egypt
• Fund Raising Team.

Othello Board Game | Python | May 2024
• Othello is a strategy board game for two players, played on an 8×8 uncheckered board. Two players compete, using 64
identical game pieces (”disks”) that are white on one side and black on the other.

state with respect to a given player.

move, updates the game board, and declares the “End of Game”.

full-stack flight booking web portal | HTML | CSS | PHP | Dec. 2024

and personalized content delivery.

dispute resolution.

Project Link
• Designed and built a comprehensive Power BI dashboard analyzing digital marketing data, utilizing star schema data modeling with 3
core tables and a Calendar table to enable time intelligence analysis.

track campaign performance trends and identify optimization opportunities.

dimensions like platform, demographics, time periods.

performance metrics across 1,470 employees.
• Conducted exploratory data analysis identifying key retention risks: new hires, frequent travelers, and specific department-role
combinations.
• Developed interactive 4-page dashboard with advanced features including drill-throughs, dynamic filtering, and cross-page navigation.
Customer Churn Analysis – Capstone Project
• Analyzed customer records using Excel PivotTables and advanced formulas to identify churn patterns and drivers.

• Identified seniors as highest-risk demographic and delivered targeted retention recommendations based on support quality insights.

• Arabic ( Native )
• English ( Professional )

Profile Summary
Computer Science student specializing in software engineering and IT security, with hands-on experience designing and building secure, scalable web and mobile applications. Strong foundation in data
structures, algorithms, and software architecture. Passionate about clean code, secure development, and
continuous improvement. Proven ability to deliver robust solutions under tight deadlines and contribute

Web & Backend Development

──────────────────────
SELECTED PROJECTS:
──────────────────────
• BMS Factory Automation System (Backend) – GitHub
Developed a production-ready backend for a real factory’s BMS system, including secure authentication, product tracking, workflow APIs, and role-based access control. Built with scalable modular
architecture suitable for industrial operations.
• BMS Factory Dashboard (Frontend) – GitHub
Created a responsive factory dashboard for operators and administrators, enabling real-time monitoring, product registration, and workflow management. Focused on clean UI, reliability, and
seamless API integration.
• E-Learning Platform – GitHub
Built secure RBAC using JWT; implemented scalable backend logic and user management modules.
• Library Management System – GitHub
Implemented a scalable backend architecture handling book rentals, admin tasks, and student
management.
• MERN Store App – GitHub
Developed full-stack e-commerce app with admin panel, product CRUD, and cart/order workflows.
• HomySync App – GitHub
Designed smart home dashboard with real-time user/device sync and interactive control using
modern component-based architecture.
• The Last of Us Game (Logic) – GitHub
Implemented AI-driven survival game in Java; modularized codebase with clean separation of logic.

Mobile Development (Flutter)
Technologies: Flutter, Dart, Firebase, REST APIs, Clean Architecture
Design Patterns: Singleton, Factory, Builder, BloC

──────────────────────
SELECTED PROJECTS:
──────────────────────
• Government Services App – GitHub
Developed a secure e-government prototype serving 500+ users with OAuth 2.0 authentication and
optimized backend communication.
• Social Media App – GitHub
Built a real-time feed supporting 1000+ daily posts using efficient state management and API
integration.
• Chat App – GitHub
Built a real-time chat app with Firebase Auth and Firestore; achieved 30% lower message latency.
• Rick and Morty App (BLoC) – GitHub
Created API-based character explorer with pagination, BLoC architecture, dependency injection,
and clean structure.
• Shoe Shop App – GitHub
Developed e-commerce app with payment simulation, optimized UI, and modular architecture.
• To-Do App – GitHub
Implemented a local-database task manager achieving 99% crash-free sessions.

────────────────
ACHIEVEMENTS
────────────────
• 1st Place – GIU CTF Competition
Led a 4-member team to solve 20+ advanced challenges (web exploitation, RE, crypto) in under 3
hours.
• Security Research and Bug Bounty Contributions
Discovered and privately disclosed multiple security flaws in real-world applications via Bugcrowd;
some earned bounties.
• Published Security Write-Ups
Payment Bypass via API Endpoints, Non-Listed Feature Access via API
Soft Skills
• Collaboration: Experienced in Agile teams, group coursework, and real-world development collaboration.
• Communication: Able to explain technical concepts clearly in presentations and documentation.
• Problem Solving: Proven through CTFs, debugging, and optimizing codebases.
• Code Architecture: Strong focus on modularity, scalability, and clean engineering practices.
• Leadership: Successfully led technical teams in projects and competitions.

─────────────
LANGUAGES
─────────────
Arabic (Native), English (Fluent)
